pi_items.source: setup_task.sh dynamically writes these exact 5 folder requirements to the instructions in /home/ga/Desktop/flight_ops_standard.txt, which are strictly scored by verifier.py.
setup_task.sh explicitly creates this directory and writes it as a strict requirement into /home/ga/Desktop/flight_ops_standard.txt.
setup_task.sh dynamically injects 'Keyword: notam' into the instructions in /home/ga/Desktop/flight_ops_standard.txt.
setup_task.sh writes 'URL: https://notams.aim.faa.gov/notamSearch/search?notam=%s' into /home/ga/Desktop/flight_ops_standard.txt and verifier.py checks for 'notams.aim.faa.gov'.

privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for the chrome_env_all drone_flight_planning_workspace task. Confirmed that all initial data and specifications are synthetically generated and explicitly written to the task environment via setup_task.sh. The expected bookmark folders ('Airspace', 'Weather', 'Photogrammetry', 'Hardware', 'Off-Duty'), the target download directory ('/home/ga/Documents/Mission_Data/Raw_Images'), and the custom search engine parameters (keyword 'notam', URL snippet 'notams.aim.faa.gov') perfectly match the generated specification file and verifier logic.
